summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Corgi Lithography & Semiconductor Photonics 2x Daily ETF (EUVX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks daily investment results corresponding to 2x the daily performance of the Corgi Lithography & Semiconductor Photonics ETF. The fund provides leveraged exposure to companies involved in photonics, EUV lithography, and semiconductor manufacturing technologies. EUVX was launched on Jun 3, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
